---
title: "Home"
---

# Peyton Estep

Hello! I'm a Data Analytics senior interested in research and using data to discover new insights!

## What you’ll find here
- A few projects I’m proud of
- The tools I use
- Ways to contact me

## Quick highlights
- **Skills:** R, Python, SQL, Excel, data visualization, statistical modeling, optimization (Gurobi)
- **Interests:** Research, Market Research, Business Analytics
- **Currently seeking:** internships / research / full-time roles

## Contact
- Email: pestep09@gmail.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/PeytonEEstep 
- LinkedIn: www.linkedin.com/in/peytonestep
